note: Real Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct runs on the paper's interleaved key-value task. K keys, each updated N times, shuffled so no two consecutive updates share a key. “First/last value” = first/last occurrence of the target key in the stream. Slide N up: the first value stays recallable, the last value gets lost among the updates.
